---
title: ""
listing:
  contents: epidemiology
  type: default
  sort:
    - sort_date desc
  categories: true
  page-size: 20
  fields: [title, description, categories]
---

<h1 class="site-title">Epidemiology</h1>

Articles and notes on epidemiologic methods, study design, causal inference, surveillance, public health, and population health research.

<br>
